texto: We are never out of clue
autor: We are well-informed that the world is a cruel place yet we seem so surprised when new skirmish happens.
explicacao: Citação de We are well-informed that the world is a cruel place yet we seem so surprised when new skirmish happens. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “We are never out of clue” articula reflexao, irene-dionaldo, never em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
